title: Senior SEO Specialist at Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a SEO Specialist for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions:
Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital Ventures Solutions!
